prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类（高热推荐）、电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）、计算机类（推荐）等物理类主要招生专业社会热度持 续偏高；湖北省物理类考生2021年14.7万→2025年25.0万持续增长，2026年估算约25.1万人（较2025年小幅增加约0.6%），竞争略有加剧。\ n上海大学位于上海市，一线城市区位优势对湖北考生有较强吸引力；该校在湖北招生占比较小（物理类2025年26人），跨省报考热度受地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年大幅扩招（+84.6%）是影响位次的最关键因素；同时2026年声誉负面信号可能抑制部分报考热情，湖北省物理类考生小 幅增加也略加剧竞争，但扩招效应远大于其他因素。预测2026年物理类最低位次约16279名，区间15779–16779名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 9283 → 10157 → 9436 → 21997 → 10764, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend; in 2024, an abnormally low ranking (21997) occurred due to major group adjustments, and in 2025 it stabilized to 10764; the baseline ranking in the past 3 years fluctuated within the 9400–10800 range; the enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hubei Province was 26 in 2021, 23 in 2022, 22 in 2023, 24 in 2024, and 26 in 2025; in 2026, the plan significantly expands to 48, an increase of about 84.6% compared to 2025, significantly increasing enrollment slots, easing competition pressure, and the ranking is expected to shift significantly backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking from 2021 to 2026 was 43rd → 46th → 48th → 56th → 61st → 60th, stabilizing in the 50–60 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 institutions; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (dean paper fraud, etc.), with 6 out of 7 incidents being negative, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity evaluation is relatively hot (overall ranking 48th), with some attention on short video platforms; no historical records of admission cut-off breaks; Sociology is A, World History is A-, with a total of 2 A- and above disciplines, which are not directly covered by the assessment of Physics Category enrollment majors (Electronic Information, Electrical, Economics, etc.), but the school's comprehensive strength still attracts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), Computer Science (recommended) and other main Physics Category enrollment majors have consistently high social popularity; the number of Physics Category candidates in Hubei Province grew from 147,000 in 2021 to 250,000 in 2025, estimated at about 251,000 in 2026 (a slight increase of about 0.6% from 2025), slightly intensifying competition. Shanghai University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city with strong regional advantages attracting Hubei candidates; its enrollment proportion in Hubei is small (26 in Physics Category in 2025), and cross-province application enthusiasm is influenced by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Overall, the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+84.6%) is the most critical factor affecting rankings; at the same time, negative reputation signals in 2026 may suppress some application enthusiasm, and the slight increase in Physics Category candidates in Hubei Province also slightly intensifies competition, but the expansion effect far outweighs other factors. The predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 16279, with a range of 15779–16779.

Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 15779) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

The baseline for 2025 is approximately 2569. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hubei Province was 4 students each year from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 3 in 2025, and further reduced to 2 in 2026, a decrease of 33.3% compared to 2025. The continuous reduction in enrollment quotas eases competition pressure (as indicated by decreasing ranking numbers).\ n211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking around 60th, stable in the 50–60 range in recent years.

学校层次与声誉.text: In 2026, the reputation evaluation is significantly negative (due to academic misconduct incidents), which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Sociology rated A, World History rated A-, which are related to the History Category enrollment majors (Liberal Arts Experimental Class including Philosophy, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism, etc.), attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Liberal Arts Experimental Class includes Chinese Language and Literature (recommended), Journalism (clearly discouraged), and other directions, showing polarization in major popularity. The number of History Category candidates in Hubei Province was 149,000 in 2021 → 141,000 in 2025, estimated at about 142,000 in 2026 (a slight increase of about 0.6% compared to 2025), slightly intensifying competition. Shanghai's first-tier city location advantage strongly attracts liberal arts candidates from Hubei. The extremely small enrollment number for History Category (only 2 in 2026) may increase competition due to scarcity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Overall, the 2026 enrollment reduction (-33.3%) is the most critical factor affecting rankings. Meanwhile, negative reputation may suppress some application enthusiasm, but the extremely small enrollment quota for History Category (only 2 students), combined with Shanghai's regional advantage, can still maintain a certain level of application popularity. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 2085, with a range of 1710–2460.
